questions.question: Describe the process of mapping an Entity-Relationship (ER) model to a relational database design using ER-to-Relational mapping. Include the steps involved in identifying the primary key, foreign keys, and normalization. (15 marks)

An ER model contains two entities, 'Customers' and 'Orders', with a one-to-many relationship between them. Using ER-to-Relational mapping, design a relational database schema for this relationship. (12 marks)
Explain the concept of normalization in relational database design and provide an example of how to identify and eliminate data redundancy using the 3rd Normal Form (3NF) rule. (8 marks)
